title: SOSP '25 Artifacts and Proofs - Running Consistent Applications Closer to Users with Radical for Lower Latency
author: Kaashoek, Nicolaas
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This record contains the proof of Linearizability for the LVI protocol as presented in our SOSP 2025 paper, as well as a detailed description of the modifications to that protocol to support a replicated server and a proof of that modified protocol's Linearizability.
steps_raw: This record contains the proof of Linearizability for the LVI protocol as presented in our SOSP 2025 paper, as well as a detailed description of the modifications to that protocol to support a replicated server and a proof of that modified protocol's Linearizability.
